hypothesis: Delta(eps)/sqrt(n) on a signed hypercube has a kink at eps = M_L that is absent on all three geometry-killed nulls.

model_selection.delta_bic_sign_convention: delta_bic = BIC(M0) - BIC(M1); positive => M1 preferred

implementation_notes.observable: Delta(eps) = |lambda_max(A + eps*B) - lambda_max(A)|; normalize by sqrt(n).
implementation_notes.B_construction: Symmetric +/-1 matrix with same sparsity pattern as A, entries drawn i.i.d. uniform {-1,+1}. Seeded per realization.
implementation_notes.huang_signs: Closed-form: for edge (u, u|2^i) with u_i=0, sign = (-1)^{popcount(u & (2^i - 1))}.
implementation_notes.ER_sampling: Geometric-skip sampling with linear-to-triangular index decoding.
implementation_notes.degree_shuffle: Start from hypercube edges, perform ~10*|E| double-edge swaps preserving degree sequence with no self-loops / multi-edges.
implementation_notes.seeding: seed = RANDOM_SEED_BASE + n*1000 + realization_idx; shared rng across graph build and B construction within a realization.
